title: Immunostaining- Fluorescent
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fb8ca","text":"Staining of mouse brain sections with immunofluroescent visualization.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Wash freshly sectioned slices of tissue 2-3 times with 1X PBS to remove OCT.
Block with 5% Normal donkey/Goat serum in 0.3% TRITON X-100 in 1X PBS for 01:00:00 at Room temperature .
Following washes, transfer sections to a primary antibody solution containing a mix of primary antibody diluted in 0.3% TRITON X-100 in 1X PBS with 1% Normal Donkey/Goat serum Overnight at 4 °C .
The following day, wash sections 5 times in 1X PBS.
Transfer sections to secondary solution containing the adequate secondary antibody diluted in 0.3%TRITON X-100 in 1X PBS with 1% Normal Donkey/Goat serum for 04:00:00 at Room temperature .
Mount sections on microscope slides with medium (Vectashield with 4',6-diamidino-2-phenylindole (DAPI), H-1800-10).
creator: Jacquelyn Haytayan
